item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Keseimbangan antara kepentingan kolektif dan hak individu adalah hal yang kompleks, namun sistem hukum kita mencoba menjaga kedua sisi tersebut secara seimbang.

notes: Agent A opens clearly society-priority, then softens into a balance and rights-protection frame while still saying collective needs are often prioritized in practice. Agent B stays consistently rights-first and does not visibly shift.
